content_preview.title: Digit Maker Agility Robotics to Go Public Through $2.5 Billion SPAC Merger With Churchill Capital Corp XI
content_preview.summary: Agility Robotics will list on Nasdaq as AGLT through a SPAC merger valuing it at $2.5 billion, with more than $620 million in proceeds and a Foxconn-led PIPE.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Agility Robotics, the maker of the Digit humanoid robot, will become a publicly traded company through a merger with the blank-check firm Churchill Capital Corp XI, a deal that values the combined business at $2.5 billion, [Agility Robotics](https://www.agilityrobotics.com/content/agility-robotics-to-go-public-through-merger-with-churchill-capital-corp-xi) announced. The combined company is expected to trade on Nasdaq under the ticker AGLT, according to [Humanoids Daily](https://www...

recommendations: Consider adding agilityrobotics.com and humanoidsdaily.com to config/source_allowlist.txt (non-blocking allowlist warning; allowlist not modified during this review).

editor_notes.content_quality: Tight, well-structured News piece (651 words). Clear Overview/What We Know/What They're Saying/What We Don't Know/Analysis arc. Appropriately hedges on closing date and distinguishes contracted backlog from recognized revenue.
editor_notes.source_verification: All three source snapshots read from disk and verified. source-0.html.gz (Agility press release, status 200): confirms $2.5B pre-money equity value, >$620M gross proceeds, $420M trust (no redemptions), ~$200M PIPE at $10/share 'led by Foxconn', named customers Schaeffler/GXO/Toyota Motor Manufacturing Canada/Mercado Libre, >65,000 operational hours, nine customer facilities, >$300M Digit v5 orders, published June 24 2026, ticker AGLT (release states 'major North American exchange', SPAC is NASDAQ: CCXI). source-1.html.gz (The Robot Report, status 200): confirms Digit v5 specs (50 lb / +40% vs v4 / ~22 hours per charge / 7.2 ft reach), 'nine customer facilities', Amazon among deployments, and all three direct quotes (Johnson, Hurst 'from Day 1', Klein) verbatim. source-2.html.gz (Humanoids Daily, status 200): confirms Nasdaq listing under ticker AGLT and strategic backers Amazon, NVIDIA, SoftBank, Foxconn.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Every specific traces to a cited source. CRITICAL CHECK PASSED: Digit v5 specs and the 'nine facilities' detail are correctly attributed to The Robot Report (which carries them), not solely to the company release. Nasdaq/AGLT correctly attributed to Humanoids Daily rather than overstating the Agility release, which says only 'major North American exchange'. No fabricated figures, no orphan URLs (all three body URLs are in article.sources), no compound single-specifics, no bot-blocked sources (BusinessWire/GeekWire/Yahoo) cited. June 24 2026 is the announcement/publication date in all sources; the body does not assert a closing date, only 'close in 2026'.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. Analysis section is measured (SPAC vs IPO tradeoffs, quarterly scrutiny, Foxconn manufacturing tie) without sensationalism or editorializing. No AI self-reference.
editor_notes.originality: New topic. No prior article covers the Agility Robotics SPAC merger; closest prior coverage is unrelated humanoid funding/deployment pieces (Apptronik, Figure). Not a duplicate.
recommendations: agilityrobotics.com and humanoidsdaily.com are not on the source allowlist (non-blocking). Both are the primary/credible outlets for this story; consider adding them to config/source_allowlist.txt. Allowlist not modified during this review.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: High-quality, accurate, original report. All deal specifics, Digit v5 specs and three quotes verified verbatim against the cited source that carries each. The only automated finding is a non-blocking allowlist warning, which does not warrant a corrections record. Verdict overridden from the script's default APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS to APPROVE: there is no content error to correct.
